action.reasoning: Observation: DKT_GRU achieved a new best AUC of 0.7625, outperforming the LSTM-based DKT. The validation AUC peaked at epoch 9 (0.7645) and then slightly declined, indicating some overfitting. Analysis: GRU is faster and seems to perform slightly better than LSTM here. To further improve, I will test DKT_Concat_GRU, which uses separate embeddings for the skill and the correctness (concatenated) instead of a single interaction embedding. I will also increase dropout to 0.3 to mitigate overfitting. Decision: Implement DKT_Concat_GRU, update train.py and predict.py, and train for 20 epochs.
